teaser: Christmas, New Year, Easter, and Valentine's greetings

messages.text: Merry Christmas! May your days be merry and bright! 🎄✨
Happy New Year! Here's to new beginnings and fresh starts! 🎆
Happy Easter! Hope your day is egg-stra special! 🐣
Be my Valentine? ❤️
Merry Christmas to the one who makes my world brighter! 🎅
New Year, same amazing us! 🥂
Wishing you a hopping Easter! 🐰
Roses are red, violets are blue, this QR code leads to my heart for you. 💌
Santa said you've been naughty... I like that. 🎅😏
May your Christmas be filled with love and your New Year with adventure! 🎁
New Year's resolution: Love you even more. Done and done. ✅
Some bunny loves you! Happy Easter! 🐇
Valentine's Day reminder: You still owe me a kiss. 💋
All I want for Christmas is you... and maybe some cookies. 🍪
Cheers to a new year of making memories together! 📸
Easter egg hunt: I found the best one - you! 🥚
Will you be my Valentine? Check yes or no. ✅❌
Merry Christmas! Let's snuggle by the fire. 🔥
New Year, new us. But I liked the old us too. 💑
Hoppy Easter! Let's get egg-cited! 🐣
You're the sweetest Valentine. Now give me chocolate! 🍫
Under the mistletoe... no excuses. 🌿💋
New Year's Eve kiss? I'm available. 😘
Easter blessings and chocolate kisses! 🍫
Valentine's Day: The one day a year I can be cheesy without judgment. 🧀
Santa's watching but I don't care. You're my only wish. 🎄
New Year, same love story. Just getting better. 📖
Easter without you would be un-egg-ceptable! 🐰
Be mine. Forever. No take backs. 💍
Merry everything and happy always! 🎉
May the new year bring us closer than ever. 🎆
You're the chocolate in my Easter basket! 🧺
Valentine's Day: I love you more than pizza. And that's saying something. 🍕
Christmas magic is real when I'm with you. ✨
Happy New Year! Let's make every moment count. ⏰
